class.name: AudioStream
class.description: [AudioStream] is an audio resource that stores audio data. It can be used by an [AudioStreamPlayer] (for non-positional audio) or [AudioStreamPlayer2D]/[AudioStreamPlayer3D] (for positional audio) to play music, sound effects, or voices. Godot has built-in audio streams that supports WAV (via [AudioStreamWAV]), Ogg Vorbis (via [AudioStreamOggVorbis]), and MP3 (via [AudioStreamMP3]) file formats. To understand how those audio files are imported, see [ResourceImporterWAV], [ResourceImporterOggVorbis], and [ResourceImporterMP3]. To handle playback of an audio stream resource at a low level, use the [AudioStreamPlayback] class.

method.name: _get_bar_beats
method.description: Overridable method. Should return the number of beats per bar of this stream.

method.name: _get_beat_count
method.description: Overridable method. Should return the total number of beats of this stream. Used by the engine to determine the length of this stream, in beats. Ideally, the returned value should be based off the stream's sample rate. An example of how sample rate is obtained can be found in [code]AudioStreamPlaybackOggVorbis::get_stream_sampling_rate()[/code], in the source code.

method.name: _get_bpm
method.description: Overridable method. Should return the tempo of this stream, in beats per minute (BPM). Used by the engine to determine the length of a beat. Ideally, the returned value should be based off the stream's sample rate. An example of how sample rate is obtained can be found in [code]AudioStreamPlaybackOggVorbis::get_stream_sampling_rate()[/code], in the source code.

method.name: _get_length
method.description: Override this method to customize the return value of [method get_length], in seconds. Used by the engine to determine the upper limit for a seeking function (such as [method AudioStreamPlayer.seek]).

method.name: _get_parameter_list
method.description: Overridable method. Should return an array representing the controllable parameters of this stream. This array contains dictionaries with a property info description format (see [method Object.get_property_list]). Additionally, the default value for a parameter must be added to each dictionary in a [code]default_value[/code] field.

method.name: _get_stream_name
method.deprecated: This method is not used by the engine.
method.description: Override this method to customize the name assigned to this audio stream.

method.name: _get_tags
method.description: Override this method to customize the tags for this audio stream. Should return a [Dictionary] of strings with the tag as the key and its content as the value. Commonly used tags include [code]title[/code], [code]artist[/code], [code]album[/code], [code]tracknumber[/code], and [code]date[/code].

method.name: _has_loop
method.description: Override this method to return [code]true[/code] if this stream has a loop. Used by the engine for looping and interactive music behavior.

method.name: _instantiate_playback
method.description: Override this method to customize the return value of [method instantiate_playback]. Should return a new [AudioStreamPlayback] created when the stream is played (such as by an [AudioStreamPlayer]).

method.name: _is_monophonic
method.description: Override this method to customize the return value of [method is_monophonic]. Should return [code]true[/code] if this stream must restart playback if called to play while already playing. Returns [code]false[/code] if this stream can play on top of itself.

method.name: can_be_sampled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this stream can be used as a sample. Only static streams can be sampled.

method.name: generate_sample
method.description: Generates an [AudioSample] based on the current stream.

method.name: get_length
method.description: Returns the length of the stream in seconds. If the stream is an [AudioStreamRandomizer], returns the length of the last played sub-stream. If the stream is an [AudioStreamPlaylist], returns the length of all sub-streams combined. If the stream is an [AudioStreamSynchronized], returns the length of the longest sub-stream. If this stream has an indefinite length (such as for [AudioStreamGenerator] and [AudioStreamMicrophone]), returns [code]0.0[/code].

method.name: instantiate_playback
method.description: Returns a newly created [AudioStreamPlayback] intended to play this stream. Useful for when you want to extend [method _instantiate_playback] but call [method instantiate_playback] from an internally held AudioStream subresource. An example of this can be found in the source code for [code]AudioStreamRandomizer::instantiate_playback[/code].

method.name: is_meta_stream
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the stream is a collection of other streams (such as [AudioStreamPlaylist]) or is polyphonic (see [method is_monophonic]).

method.name: is_monophonic
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this stream only supports one playback at a time ([i]monophony[/i]), or [code]false[/code] if the stream supports multiple playbacks at once ([i]polyphony[/i]).

signal.name: parameter_list_changed
signal.description: Signal to be emitted to notify when the parameter list changed.
